params.label: Suffix
params.tip: Output column suffix → clusters.<suffix> and obsm['X_umap.<suffix>']. Keeps multiple resolutions / re-clusterings side by side.

params.label: Populations
params.tip: Populations to cluster, across any segmentation — “<seg> · all” is every cell of that segmentation, plus any gated sub-populations. All selected cells from all selected images are clustered jointly, so cluster IDs are comparable across the set.

params.label: Cluster on
params.tip: Feature columns to cluster on — channel intensities (mean_intensity_N) and/or object/morphology measures (area, sphericity, …).

params.label: Resolution
params.tip: Leiden resolution — higher gives more, smaller clusters.

params.label: Calculate UMAP
params.tip: Also compute a UMAP embedding (obsm['X_umap.<suffix>']) for plotting.

params.label: Axis
params.tip: Per-channel percentile rescale to [0,1], per-cell total normalisation, or none.

params.label: Normalise to median
params.tip: Divide each channel by its median before the percentile rescale.

params.label: Max fraction (per-cell)
params.tip: Per-cell normalisation: exclude channels exceeding this fraction of a cell's total (0 = off).

params.label: Top percentile
params.tip: Upper percentile mapped to 1.0 in per-channel normalisation.

params.label: Bottom percentile
params.tip: Lower percentile mapped to 0.0 in per-channel normalisation.

params.label: Log base
params.tip: Base for the log transform (Ln when 0).

params.label: Use PAGA
params.tip: Initialise the UMAP from a PAGA graph (preserves global cluster topology).

params.label: PAGA threshold
params.tip: Edge-weight threshold for the PAGA graph.
